input: I have a mild headache since this morning, probably just didn't sleep well
My nose is runny and I have a slight scratchy throat
I have been feeling really tired and fatigued for the past two days after exams
I have a small cut on my finger from cooking, it stopped bleeding but hurts a bit
Stomach pain after eating cafeteria food, with some vomiting and diarrhea today
I twisted my ankle playing basketball and it's quite swollen, I can hobble but it hurts
I have a fever of 101F and body aches since yesterday
My ear really hurts and it feels blocked
High fever of 104F that won't go down with paracetamol, I feel confused and my neck is stiff
Suddenly I got the worst headache of my life, it feels like a thunderclap
I'm having trouble breathing, my chest feels tight and my inhaler isn't working
I just got stung by a bee and my lips and tongue are swelling up fast, hard to breathe
I fell off my bike and I think my arm is broken, it looks deformed
I have terrible pain in my lower right stomach, it hurts really bad when I press it
I've been vomiting blood for the last hour
I have a rash that is spreading fast and a high fever of 102F
It burns really bad when I pee and my back is starting to hurt too
I have been having panic attacks every day this week and I feel completely overwhelmed
I feel so dizzy every time I stand up, and I haven't peed since yesterday
I have a toothache that is keeping me awake at night, my cheek is starting to swell
